title: `read_verilog`: `inout` parameters not copied out of tasks

features.name: task inout parameter modified in conditional
features.description: Code should include a task with an inout parameter that is modified inside conditional if-else logic

features.name: always_comb block calling task with inout argument
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that calls a task with an inout argument passed from a local variable
